title: Choosing the Wrong Language Costs AI Teams Months of Work
summary: Darren Builds AI argues that choosing the right programming language is critical for AI teams, particularly as team size grows. The video advocates for TypeScript over Python for AI coding work, citing benefits of language server protocols, type checking, and compile-time error detection that reduce runtime mistakes and friction in collaborative AI development.
